service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort
service-call.in-map: [workEffortTypeEnumId: 'WetEvent', workEffortName: name, description: description, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, actualStartDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, visibilityEnumId: userGroupId, ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffortParty
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: workEffortId, partyId: partyId, roleTypeId: 'ThirdParty', statusId: 'WeptAssigned' ]

service.description: get a single or multiple activities

return.message: Getting a list of activities, requires an activity type

set.from: [ partyId: event.partyId, pseudoId: event.pseudoId, firstName: event.firstName, lastName: event.lastName, company: [partyid: event.companyPartyId, pseudoId: event.companyPartyId, name: event.companyName, ]]

[ activityId: event.workEffortId, activityType: typeConvert[event.workEffortTypeEnumId], pseudoId: event.pseudoId, usergroup: event.userGroupId, opportunityId: event.opportunityId, activityName: event.workEffortName, description: event.description, eventDate: event.actualStartDate ? ec.l10n.format(event.actualStartDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, thirdParty: thirdparty, ]

return.message: activity $activityId for owner: $ownerPartyId not found

set.from: [ activityId: entry.workEffortId, pseudoId: entry.pseudoId, activityType: typeConvert[entry.workEffortTypeEnumId], activityName: entry.workEffortName, statusId: convertedStatusId, ]

[ timeEntryId: te.timeEntryId, activityId: te.workEffortId, partyId: te.partyId, hours: te.hours?.toString(), date: te.fromDate ? ec.l10n.format(te.fromDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, comments: te.comments, status: te.approvalStatusId == 'TesApproved' ? 'approved' : 'inProcess', invoiceId: te.invoiceId, vendorInvoiceId: te.vendorInvoiceId ]

[ partyId: entry.orgPartyId, pseudoId: entry.orgPseudoId, role: entry.orgRole, firstName: entry.orgFirstName, lastName: entry.orgLastName, email: entry.orgEmail, company: [ partyId: entry.orgCompanyPartyId, pseudoId: entry.orgCompanyPseudoId, name: entry.orgCompanyName, ]]

[ partyId: entry.assPartyId, pseudoId: entry.assPseudoId, role: entry.assRole, firstName: entry.assFirstName, lastName: entry.assLastName, email: entry.assEmail, company: [ partyId: entry.assCompanyPartyId, pseudoId: entry.assCompanyPseudoId, name: entry.assCompanyName, ]]

[ partyId: entry.tpPartyId, pseudoId: entry.tpPseudoId, role: entry.tpRole, firstName: entry.tpFirstName, lastName: entry.tpLastName, email: entry.tpEmail, company: [ partyId: entry.tpCompanyPartyId, pseudoId: entry.tpCompanyPseudoId, name: entry.tpCompanyName, ]]
[ activityId: entry.workEffortId, activityType: typeConvert[entry.workEffortTypeEnumId], parentActivityId: entry.parentWorkEffortId, activityName: entry.workEffortName, statusId: convertedStatusId, ]

[ activityId: entry.workEffortId, pseudoId: entry.pseudoId, activityType: typeConvert[entry.workEffortTypeEnumId], parentActivityId: entry.parentWorkEffortId, activityName: entry.workEffortName, statusId: convertedStatusId, description: entry.description, estimatedStartDate: entry.estimatedStartDate? ec.l10n.format(entry.estimatedStartDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, estimatedEndDate: entry.estimatedCompletionDate? ec.l10n.format(entry.estimatedCompletionDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, actualStartDate: entry.actualStartDate? ec.l10n.format(entry.actualStartDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, actualEndDate: entry.actualCompletionDate? ec.l10n.format(entry.actualCompletionDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, unInvoicedHours: unInvoicedHours.toString(), rate: rate, originator: originator, assignee: assignee, thirdParty: thirdParty, timeEntries: teOutList, ]

return.message: Activity type $workEffortType($activityType) not supported
Activity type $activityType not supported, only Event and ToDo supported

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortPseudoId: activity.pseudoId, parentWorkEffortId: activity.parentActivityId, workEffortTypeEnumId: typeConvert[activity.activityType], workEffortName: activity.activityName, statusId: statusId, description: activity.description, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, actualStartDate: activity.startDate ? activity.startDate.substring(0,18) : null, actualCompletionDate: activity.endDate ? activity.endDate.substring(0,18) : null, routing: activity.routing, ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffortParty
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: workEffortId, partyId: activity.originator?.partyId ?: ec.user.userAccount.partyId, roleTypeId: 'Originator', statusId: 'WeptAssigned' ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffortParty
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: workEffortId, partyId: activity.assignee?.partyId ?: ec.user.userAccount.partyId, roleTypeId: 'Assignee', statusId: 'WeptAssigned' ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffortParty
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: workEffortId, partyId: activity.thirdParty.partyId, roleTypeId: 'ThirdParty', statusId: 'WeptAssigned' ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.humanres.rate.RateAmount
service-call.in-map: [workEffortId: workEffortId, rateTypeEnumId: 'RatpStandard', ratePurposeEnumId: 'RaprClient', timePeriodUomId: 'TF_hr', fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, rateAmount: activity.rate]

service.description: Update a activity within a project

return.message: Activity ${activity.activityId} not found

if.condition: activity.activityName && oldActivity.activityName != activity.activityName || activity.description && oldActivity.description != activity.description || activity.statusId && oldActivity.statusId != activity.statusId

service-call.name: update#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: activity.activityId, workEffortPseudoId: activity.pseudoId, parentWorkEffortId: activity.parentActivityId, workEffortTypeEnumId: typeConvert[activity.activityType], workEffortName: activity.activityName, statusId: statusId, description: activity.description, actualStartDate: activity.estimatedStartDate ? activity.estimatedStartDate.substring(0,18) : null, actualCompletionDate: activity.estimatedEndDate ? activity.estimatedEndDate.substring(0,18) : null ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffortParty
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: activity.activityId, partyId: activity.assignee.partyId, roleTypeId: 'Assignee', statusId: 'WeptAssigned' ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffortParty
service-call.in-map: [ workEffortId: activity.activityId, partyId: activity.thirdParty.partyId, roleTypeId: 'ThirdParty', statusId: 'WeptAssigned' ]

service-call.name: create#mantle.humanres.rate.RateAmount
service-call.in-map: [workEffortId: activity.activityId, rateTypeEnumId: 'RatpStandard', ratePurposeEnumId: 'RaprClient', timePeriodUomId: 'TF_hr', fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, rateAmount: activity.rate]

service.description: get hours worked just used internally, no owner check here

set.from: [ timeEntryId: te.timeEntryId, activityId: te.workEffortId, partyId: te.partyId, hours: te.hours?.toString(), comments: te.comments, date: te.fromDate ? ec.l10n.format(te.fromDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, status: convertedStatusId, invoiceId: te.invoiceId, vendorInvoiceId: te.vendorInvoiceId ]

return.message: Activity not found: ${timeEntry.activityId}

service-call.name: create#mantle.work.time.TimeEntry
service-call.in-map: [ timeEntryId: timeEntry.timeEntryId, workEffortId: timeEntry.activityId, partyId: entryPartyId, hours: timeEntry.hours, comments: timeEntry.comments, approvalStatusId: 'TesInProcess', fromDate: timeEntry.date ? timeEntry.date?.substring(0,10) : ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service.description: update hours worked; admins can also approve (status: approved) or send back (status: inProcess). Invoiced entries cannot be changed.

return.message: Time entry ${timeEntry.timeEntryId} not found
Activity not found: ${teOld.workEffortId}
Cannot update time entry: already invoiced
Only admins can update time entries of others
Only admins can change the time entry approval status
Time entry status ${timeEntry.status} not valid
Activity not found: ${timeEntry.activityId}
Cannot delete time entry: already invoiced

service.description: Create an invoice from approved, not yet invoiced time entries. sales=true: a sales invoice to a client (partyId) covering the approved hours on all tasks where the client is the third party; the hourly rate comes from the rate defined on each task. sales=false: a purchase (self-billing) invoice for an assistant (partyId) covering their approved hours; the hourly rate is the hourlyRate parameter. Admin only.

return.message: Only admins can create invoices from time entries
No tasks found for client ${partyId}
No hourly rate defined on task ${task.workEffortName} [${task.workEffortPseudoId}]

iterate.script: items.add([ itemType: [itemTypeId: 'ItemTimeEntry'], description: "${task.workEffortName} (${taskHours} hours)".toString(), quantity: taskHours, price: rateAmounts[0].rateAmount])

return.message: No approved un-invoiced hours found for client ${partyId}

service-call.name: growerp.100.FinDocServices100.create#FinDoc
service-call.in-map: [finDoc: [ docType: 'invoice', sales: true, otherCompany: [partyId: partyId], description: 'Invoice for hours worked', items: items]]

return.message: hourlyRate is required for an assistant (purchase) invoice
No approved un-invoiced hours found for assistant ${partyId}

iterate.script: items.add([ itemType: [itemTypeId: 'ItemTimeEntry'], description: "${taskNames[taskId]} (${hours} hours)".toString(), quantity: hours, price: hourlyRate])

service-call.name: growerp.100.FinDocServices100.create#FinDoc
service-call.in-map: [finDoc: [ docType: 'invoice', sales: false, otherUser: [partyId: partyId], description: 'Assistant hours self-billing invoice', items: items]]

service.description: Hours per assistant: in process (not yet approved), approved (billable) and invoiced. Admins see all assistants; other users only see their own hours.

iterate.script: def bucket if (te.invoiceId || te.vendorInvoiceId) bucket = 'invoicedHours' else if (te.approvalStatusId == 'TesApproved') bucket = 'approvedHours' else bucket = 'inProcessHours' totals[te.partyId][bucket] = totals[te.partyId][bucket] + (te.hours ?: 0)

reportItems.add([ partyId: entryPartyId, pseudoId: party?.pseudoId, firstName: person?.firstName, lastName: person?.lastName, inProcessHours: hoursMap.inProcessHours.toString(), approvedHours: hoursMap.approvedHours.toString(), invoicedHours: hoursMap.invoicedHours.toString()])
